file_insights.purpose: Marks tests directory as a Python package
file_insights.observations: Minimal, clean init file with only docstring

file_insights.purpose: Central pytest fixture definitions for test suite
key_components: MockLLMProvider class (20 lines) - Test double for LLMProvider interface
mock_provider fixture - Returns unconfigured mock for flexible test setup
sample_suno_output fixture - Portuguese Catholic hymn example data
sample_eval_result fixture - Verdict + scoring example with rationale
sample_preset fixture - Brazilian Catholic hymn template configuration
tmp_output_dir fixture - Temporary file I/O directory

patterns_discovered.evidence: MockLLMProvider.calls list captures all invocations with full parameters
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables assertion on how mocked methods were called

patterns_discovered.evidence: set_response() normalizes BaseModel, dict, and str to JSON string internally
patterns_discovered.benefit: Tests can provide response data in most convenient format

patterns_discovered.evidence: MockLLMProvider extends LLMProvider and implements all abstract methods
patterns_discovered.benefit: Guarantees mock maintains contract with real implementation

patterns_discovered.evidence: Multiple fixtures for different domain models enable flexible test scenarios
patterns_discovered.benefit: Tests can mix/match fixtures rather than creating test data inline

patterns_discovered.evidence: Union types (str | dict | BaseModel) used throughout
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear API contract and IDE support

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: MockLLMProvider.generate() raises ValueError if no canned response set
gotchas_discovered.impact: Tests must explicitly set response via set_response() before calling generate()
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Could add default response in __init__ or make fixture pre-configure a response

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: response_schema parameter captured but not validated
gotchas_discovered.impact: Mock provider doesn't verify that canned response matches expected schema
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider adding optional schema validation in generate() method

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: tmp_output_dir fixture created but not used by sample data fixtures
gotchas_discovered.impact: May create disconnect between file-based tests and in-memory test data
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider linking fixture to sample data writing, or documenting standalone purpose

what_succeeded: Implemented complete mock LLM provider matching interface contract
Created realistic sample data for all major domain models
Set up pytest fixture infrastructure with clear separation of concerns
Enabled call tracking for assertion-based mock verification
Provided temporary directory for potential file I/O testing
approach_details.completeness: All requested fixtures implemented and functional

recommendations.rationale: MockLLMProvider could validate canned responses match expected schema to catch test bugs early

recommendations.item: Create fixture factories for common mock configurations
recommendations.rationale: Tests could use @pytest.fixture(params=[...]) or factory pattern for common mock setups

recommendations.item: Add docstring examples to MockLLMProvider showing usage patterns
recommendations.rationale: Clarify how to use set_response() and verify calls for test authors

recommendations.item: Consider creating fixtures combining mock_provider with pre-configured responses
recommendations.rationale: Common test scenarios (successful generation, validation failure, etc.) could be fixture-based

recommendations.item: Link tmp_output_dir fixture to sample data if file writing tests are planned
recommendations.rationale: Would enable end-to-end testing with realistic file I/O workflows
